text: Deterministic start
When something didn't go as planned today, what was your first reaction?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I looked for what I could change.","next":"A1_Q2","signal":"axis1:internal"},{"id":"2","label":"I noticed both my part and the situation.","next":"A1_Q2","signal":"axis1:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I focused on what was outside my control.","next":"A1_Q2","signal":"axis1:external"}]

text: What did you do next?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I made a small adjustment myself.","next":"A1_Q3","signal":"axis1:internal"},{"id":"2","label":"I paused and checked my part.","next":"A1_Q3","signal":"axis1:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I waited for someone else to step in.","next":"A1_Q3","signal":"axis1:external"}]

text: What part of it still felt like yours to own?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I owned my part.","next":"A1_Q4","signal":"axis1:internal"},{"id":"2","label":"I owned some of it, not all of it.","next":"A1_Q4","signal":"axis1:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"It mostly felt like the situation's problem.","next":"A1_Q4","signal":"axis1:external"}]

text: Looking back, what would you do differently next time?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I would act sooner.","next":"A1_D1","signal":"axis1:internal"},{"id":"2","label":"I would clarify my part earlier.","next":"A1_D1","signal":"axis1:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I would ask for support sooner.","next":"A1_D1","signal":"axis1:external"}]

text: Weigh the four control signals together and route by the dominant locus.
You stayed with what you could control. That kind of agency makes the next step smaller and clearer.
You held your part and the situation at the same time. That balance keeps the reading honest.
You noticed the pressure came from outside you. Even then, naming that boundary is still a choice.
Agency is clearer now. Carry that control pattern into how you show up for the work itself.
When you showed up for this task, what was your stance?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I was focused on contributing.","next":"A2_Q2","signal":"axis2:contribution"},{"id":"2","label":"I was partly contributing and partly protecting myself.","next":"A2_Q2","signal":"axis2:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I expected more to come back to me than I gave.","next":"A2_Q2","signal":"axis2:entitlement"}]

text: What did your actions look like after that?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I put in steady effort.","next":"A2_Q3","signal":"axis2:contribution"},{"id":"2","label":"I did some of the work, but not all of it.","next":"A2_Q3","signal":"axis2:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I waited for someone else to carry the load.","next":"A2_Q3","signal":"axis2:entitlement"}]

text: How did you respond when the work got harder?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I kept contributing.","next":"A2_Q4","signal":"axis2:contribution"},{"id":"2","label":"I gave some effort, then pulled back.","next":"A2_Q4","signal":"axis2:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I felt owed support before I kept going.","next":"A2_Q4","signal":"axis2:entitlement"}]

text: If you were honest about your role, what would you say?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"I gave more than I asked for.","next":"A2_D1","signal":"axis2:contribution"},{"id":"2","label":"I gave a fair but mixed amount.","next":"A2_D1","signal":"axis2:balanced"},{"id":"3","label":"I expected help without matching it.","next":"A2_D1","signal":"axis2:entitlement"}]

text: Weigh the four effort signals against what Axis 1 already showed.
Choose the dominant orientation after looking at the full effort pattern.
You showed up with something to give. Because Axis 1 already showed choice, this contribution reads as owned rather than forced.
You gave some and held some back. That middle ground often appears when agency is present but guarded.
You expected more than you gave. After Axis 1 showed control, this stands out as a mismatch in stance.
The effort pattern is clear now. Bring that into how far the impact reaches.
Who did this mainly affect?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"Mostly me and my own space.","next":"A3_Q2","signal":"axis3:self"},{"id":"2","label":"Me and a few others.","next":"A3_Q2","signal":"axis3:mixed"},{"id":"3","label":"Other people more than me.","next":"A3_Q2","signal":"axis3:altrocentric"}]

text: After that, where did your attention go?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"Back to my own needs.","next":"A3_Q3","signal":"axis3:self"},{"id":"2","label":"To both my needs and others'.","next":"A3_Q3","signal":"axis3:mixed"},{"id":"3","label":"Toward how it landed for other people.","next":"A3_Q3","signal":"axis3:altrocentric"}]

text: How far did the impact spread?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"It mostly stayed with me.","next":"A3_Q4","signal":"axis3:self"},{"id":"2","label":"It touched me and a few others.","next":"A3_Q4","signal":"axis3:mixed"},{"id":"3","label":"It spread mainly to others.","next":"A3_Q4","signal":"axis3:altrocentric"}]

text: What did you want to protect most?
options: [{"id":"1","label":"My own energy and space.","next":"A3_D1","signal":"axis3:self"},{"id":"2","label":"A fair balance between me and others.","next":"A3_D1","signal":"axis3:mixed"},{"id":"3","label":"Other people's experience.","next":"A3_D1","signal":"axis3:altrocentric"}]

text: Weigh the four radius signals together and route by the dominant reach.
You kept the impact close to yourself. With agency and effort already named, this keeps the radius narrow and protected.
You held your needs alongside others'. The earlier axes already showed choice and contribution, so the radius now looks shared and balanced.
You kept other people in view. With agency and contribution already in place, the radius moves outward with purpose.
The radius is clear now. Carry agency and contribution into the final synthesis.

You showed {axis1:internal="you kept your control close"; axis1:balanced="you held your part and the situation together"; axis1:external="you noticed what was outside your control"}, {axis2:contribution="you kept contributing"; axis2:balanced="you gave some and held some back"; axis2:entitlement="you expected more than you gave"}, and {axis3:self="you kept the radius close to yourself"; axis3:mixed="you held the radius between you and others"; axis3:altrocentric="you kept others in view"}. That reads as agency, contribution, and radius working together.
Tree complete.
